creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Created attachment 238158
Update to 0.3.3

Update dovecot-fts-flatcurve to the latest release including a number of fixes.
Full changelog can be found here:

https://github.com/slusarz/dovecot-fts-flatcurve/compare/v0.3.2...v0.3.3

Also upped the minimally required version of dovecot to 2.3.17. Only versions of dovecot-fts-flatcurve up to 0.2.0 supported older versions of dovecot.
